name: **Mistakes** my San Diego firm is making causing AI invisibility?

mainEntity.name: **Mistakes** my San Diego firm is making causing AI invisibility?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Relying on websites/keywords instead of peer recognitions, using templated bios.** AI ignores self-claims.[3] Inconsistent PR.[2]

**Key factors:**
- No third-party signals
- Generic content
- Poor structured data
- Isolated assertions

**Stop SEO focus; audit and pursue directories.** Align messaging.[1] **Common pitfalls are fixable.**
